calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-07-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2016 Continued To Apr-20-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiffs Notice Of Hearing Date
Off Calendar Mar-03-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840

Peter Bales, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Bank of the West, A California Banking Corporation,
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant T & A Excavating, LLC, A South Carolina Limited Liability Company and Anthony E. Coulston,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $94,947.11
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $899.10
Costs: $850.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $96,696.21

Judgment signed in open court.
